title: SimpleMultiplayerVanilla+
description:
A simple modpack for simple Minecraft with friends. 

Adds lots of performance mods, some qol mods, datapacks, visual improvements, and more.
body:
# Hey!
This modpack contains Essential, which allows for easy multiplayer with some friends, lots of performance mods, shaders, qol mods such as MouseWheelie and ChestTracker. Also includes a lot of small tweaks that improve vanilla minecraft like 3DSkinLayers, FallingLeaves, and other visual improvements. Yup.
